title: Apache ActiveMQ CVE-2023-46604 Exploitation Leading to LockBit Ransomware
summary: DFIR analysis of a mid-Feb 2024 intrusion where threat actors exploited CVE-2023-46604 on an internet-facing Apache ActiveMQ server to achieve RCE, deployed Metasploit/Meterpreter, dumped LSASS credentials across multiple hosts, used AnyDesk for persistent access, and ultimately deployed LockBit ransomware (LockBit Black builder) via RDP. The attacker was evicted after the first intrusion but returned 18 days later through the same unpatched vulnerability. Time from initial access to ransomware: ~19 days (419 hours). Modified ransom note directed victims to Session messaging app rather than official LockBit sites, indicating independent use of leaked LockBit builder.

title: Chrome Zero-Day CVE-2026-5281 Under Active Exploitation
summary: Use-after-free in Dawn (WebGPU). Chrome < 146.0.7680.178. CVSS 8.8. Actively exploited.
details: "Patch to 146.0.7680.178. Crafted HTML page + compromised renderer = RCE. CISA KEV likely incoming."

title: Citrix NetScaler SAML IDP RCE - CVE-2026-3055 - CVSS 9.0
summary: NetScaler ADC/Gateway SAML IDP config allows RCE. CVSS 9.0. MuddyWater (Iran) actively scanning DIB perimeters for exposed VPN endpoints.
details: "Patch immediately if SAML IDP is enabled. Hunt VPN gateway logs for anomalous activity last 48hrs."

title: CERT-UA Impersonation - UAC-0255 - 1M Emails - AGEWHEEZE RAT
summary: UAC-0255 spoofed CERT-UA. 1M emails March 26-27 2026. Password-protected ZIP delivered AGEWHEEZE RAT.
details: "Ukraine gov sector target. Cert-UA officially disclosed. BEC/impersonation pattern relevant for DIB monitoring."
